hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.vue ]]; then npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.vue ]]; then cd client && npx vue-tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi'
